title: kyb_collected
description: KYB (Know Your Business) data successfully captured and encrypted for a tenant. Cut by POST /v1/trust-hub/kyb route. EIN, DOB, SSN have been written to Supabase Vault; this receipt records the audit event ONLY. PII fields (EIN/DOB/SSN/email/phone/full_name) MUST NEVER appear in inputs_redacted or outputs.

inputs_redacted.description: Safe identifiers only. PII keys are rejected at the trust_receipts.py write boundary (Law #9, R-006). This schema enforces the same allowlist for downstream replay/validation.

rep_count.description: How many authorized representatives were captured (1 or 2 per Twilio policy).

address_state.description: 2-letter US state code. NOT considered PII (public business directory information).

vault_secret_count.description: How many vault.secrets entries were created during this KYB (1 EIN + N DOB + N SSN_last4 = up to 5).

outputs.description: Twilio SIDs and operational metrics only. NO PII.

allOf.$comment: PII rejection: any field NOT explicitly in the allowlist above is rejected by additionalProperties: false. Forbidden keys (defined in trust_receipts._FORBIDDEN_PII_KEYS): email, phone_e164, phone_number, first_name, last_name, full_name, dob, date_of_birth, ssn, ssn_last4, ein, tax_id, address_street, raw_business_name, owner_name.
